creator: aldis@bsdroot.lv
text:
Update multimedia/playd to v1.9.2

Changelog:
* rendomize is now called randomise
* Rewrote man page much more correctly (http://manpages.bsd.lv/)
* Fixed many typos
* Fixed regression that caused playlists to always be appended (to mplayer)
* Fixed Linux compatibility

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
